final:
module up_counter_with_enable_async_reset_3bit(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3-1:1-1] count
    );

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 3'b000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
